settings.text: Choose tape by width, facing color, and application.
3" white vapor barrier seam tape is the best choice for BlueTex seams.
Red tape is for construction and masking uses, not for BlueTex seams.
Bulk and contractor packs are useful for larger metal building projects.

settings.heading: White Tape
settings.text: Primary seam tape for BlueTex white-facing products.

settings.heading: 6" Repair
settings.text: For larger tears and patches.

settings.heading: Foil Tape
settings.text: For foil-facing seams and repairs.

settings.heading: Bulk Packs
settings.text: Useful for crews and repeat installs.

settings.heading: Seams and repairs
settings.text: Use the right width and facing for BlueTex seams, foil-facing work, or larger patches.

settings.heading: Wrong facing
settings.text: Do not use red vapor barrier tape for BlueTex seams. Use 3" white tape instead.

settings.heading: Rolls or parts
settings.text: Tape usually works with BlueTex rolls, TermBars, or door kit material.

settings.heading: Is This Right For Me?
settings.text: Pick tape by what you are sealing, repairing, or temporarily holding.

settings.heading: BlueTex seams
settings.text: Best for seaming BlueTex white-facing products.

settings.heading: Repairs
settings.text: Use for larger tears, patches, and wider repairs.

settings.heading: Foil facing
settings.text: Use for foil-facing seams and reflective surfaces.

settings.heading: Special use
settings.text: Red is for construction or masking. Double-sided tape helps temporary hold and door kits.

settings.heading: Choose the Right Tape
settings.text: Keep this simple: match tape width and facing to the job.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Pro 2mm 50" Wide
settings.text: Common roll product paired with 3" white vapor barrier seam tape.

settings.heading: 48" Wide Aluminum Term Bars
settings.text: Fastens BlueTex before seams are sealed.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Cover/Repair System Sample Box
settings.text: Test rolls, TermBars, tape, and clips before a larger project.

settings.heading: For BlueTex seams, use 3" White Tape
settings.text: Red tape is not recommended for BlueTex seams.

settings.heading: Don’t Forget These Parts
settings.text: Tape is usually part of a larger BlueTex system, not the whole project by itself.

settings.heading: Application notes
settings.text: Apply tape to clean, dry surfaces and press firmly across the full width. Some vapor barrier tapes can take 30+ days to fully cure.

settings.heading: Specs
settings.text: Check the selected variant for tape width, roll length, backing style, color, and pack size.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.text: Use 3" white vapor barrier seam tape for BlueTex seams. Use 6" white tape for larger tears and repair patches.

settings.heading: Details
settings.text: Application notes, specs, and tape questions are available below.
